prompt: Implement GShare in model.py. The predictor has a power-of-two table of 2-bit saturating counters initialized weakly taken (2), an N-bit global history register, and indexes with (pc >> 2) XOR history. predict returns taken for counters >= 2. update changes the indexed counter and then shifts the actual outcome into history. Reject invalid table/history sizes.
